creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: patched->closed

Changeset MFC'ed to RELENG_8.  Unfortunately it was not approved by 
re@ for 8.1-RELEASE due to concerns about short test period.  This 
driver is now part of 8-STABLE and will be included in 8.2-RELEASE. 

Thanks for your submission!
